samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespaces.
Replace legacy JUnit 3/4 with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) for modern testing support.
Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API required by Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
Configure the compiler to target Java 21 using the release flag.
Update Groovy Eclipse Batch dependency to a version compatible with newer Java/Groovy versions.
Replace deprecated FindBugs annotations with SpotBugs annotations.
Upgrade JKube Kubernetes Maven Plugin to a recent version.
Upgrade JKube OpenShift Maven Plugin to a recent version.
Upgrade Jib Maven Plugin to a recent version for container building.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test dependency for integrated testing support.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce pure JUnit 5 usage.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect new project structure.
Change parent POM to a custom internal parent instead of Spring Boot starter parent.
Explicitly set project build source encoding to UTF-8.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.general_idea: Ensure package lists are updated before installing dependencies in the build stage.
Reduce build noise by suppressing Maven console output.
Switch from deprecated AdoptOpenJDK image to a maintained Alpine-based JDK image.
Upgrade Alpine package tools and available packages for security and compatibility.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN apk add --upgrade apk-tools && apk upgrade --available

samples/SimpleSpringApp/Dockerfile.general_idea: Allow the runtime user account name to be configured via a build argument.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Refine the list of required tools and access permissions to reflect GCP account login instead of generic K8s context.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Replace 'Logged into a terminal window... K8 cluster' with 'You have logged into a (Unix) terminal window... GCP account'

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Introduce a new section for fully automated deployment using the 'Run on Google Cloud' button.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Add 'Fully Automated Build/Deploy' section with image link and anchor definition

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Split build instructions into local machine and Docker-specific methods for clarity.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Rename 'Build Instructions' to 'Build Instructions on Local Machine' and add 'Build Instructions using Docker'

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Provide explicit command for building the Docker image using the gcloud project ID.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Add 'docker build . [-t gcr.io/$(gcloud config get-value project)/web8k-example:1.0]'

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Update the local run command to use the dynamic project ID and specific tag.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Change 'docker run ... gcr.io/investdemo-300915/web8k-example' to 'docker run ... gcr.io/$(gcloud config get-value project)/web8k-example:1.0'

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Explicitly list the supported RESTful endpoints and their methods in the documentation.
Update the Cloud Run deployment command to explicitly specify the managed platform.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Add '--platform managed' to 'gcloud run deploy' command

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Add a command to list deployed services to assist with verification and cleanup.
Refine cleanup steps to include listing services and specifying platform for deletion.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.human_impl: Replace 'mvn clean jib:clean' with 'mvn clean' and add '--platform managed' to delete command

samples/SimpleSpringApp/README.md.general_idea: Update the reference links to point to current Cloud Run and Spring Boot Docker guides.
